title: Warcrawler
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Warcrawler.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Scavengers disembarking from their wheeled transport.]]
'''Warcrawlers''' were ground vehicles used by the [[Dark Empire]]. During the [[Second Battle of Coruscant|reoccupation]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by the Dark Empire, some warcrawlers carried [[Nek/Legends|Neks]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''
